nasb.text: Every man shall give as he is able, according to the blessing of the Lord your God which He has given you.

esv.text: Every man shall give as he is able, according to the blessing of the Lord your God that he has given you.

cnv.text: 各人要按手中的力量，照著耶和華你的　神賜你的福，奉獻禮物。

ccb.text: 各人要按祂赐的福分，尽自己的能力献上礼物。
